title: We sing the praise of Him who died
firstLine: We sing the praise of Him who died,
publicDomainBasis: Thomas Kelly (1769–1855), Ludwig van Beethoven (1770–1827). All public domain.

sections.label: Verse 1
sections.text:
We sing the praise of Him who died,
Of Him who died upon the Cross;
The sinner’s hope let men deride,
For this we count the world but loss.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Inscribed upon the Cross we see
In shining letters, God is love!
He bears our sins upon the tree,
He brings us mercy from above.

sections.label: Verse 3
Verse 4
sections.text:
The balm of life, the cure of woe,
The measure and the pledge of love,
The sinner’s refuge here below,
The angels’ theme in heav’n above.
